final_files.tests/test_project_transition_final.py:
import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path

ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]


def database():
    connection = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
    for name in ("ticket_lifecycle.sql", "project_dashboard.sql"):
        connection.executescript((ROOT / "sql" / name).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    return connection


def counts(db):
    return db.execute("SELECT project_id, open_ticket_count FROM project_metrics ORDER BY project_id").fetchall()


def test_moving_an_archived_ticket_does_not_change_either_project_count():
    db = database()
    db.executemany("INSERT INTO project VALUES (?, ?)", [(1, 'Queue A'), (2, 'Queue B')])
    db.execute("INSERT INTO ticket VALUES (7, 1, 'Historical case', '2026-07-20', '2026-07-11T10:00:00Z')")

    db.execute("UPDATE ticket SET project_id = 2 WHERE ticket_id = 7")
    assert counts(db) == [(1, 0), (2, 0)]


def test_restore_during_reassignment_applies_only_to_the_destination():
    db = database()
    db.executemany("INSERT INTO project VALUES (?, ?)", [(1, 'Queue A'), (2, 'Queue B')])
    db.execute("INSERT INTO ticket VALUES (8, 1, 'Reopened case', '2026-07-22', '2026-07-11T11:00:00Z')")

    db.execute("UPDATE ticket SET project_id = 2, archived_at = NULL WHERE ticket_id = 8")
    assert counts(db) == [(1, 0), (2, 1)]
